event: Return to NYC from compound after New Year — story staging begins
alex_pov_summary: Back in New York after compound New Year. Grammys four weeks out. The year already has gravity.

event: AL.X team January briefing — James Latham presents Q1 opportunities triage; Burberry campaign pre-production timeline discussed
alex_pov_summary: Eleanor's operation maps Q1. Grammy prep running alongside Burberry pre-production. Alex listens. Asks two questions. Says he'll think about the spring schedule.

event: Grammy nominee spotlight — DG releases behind-the-scenes clip from Album I recording sessions; 4.2M views in 24hrs
alex_pov_summary: The algorithm runs without him. He watches the clip once and puts his phone down.

event: STORY OPEN + CHICKEN SHOP DATE DROPS: Alex at West 71st; Chicken Shop Date episode (Amelia Dimoldenberg) drops without warning or promo; Grammy 18 days out; GQ publishes in 2 days
alex_pov_summary: The Chicken Shop Date drops today. No warning. He knew it was coming. The Grammy is 18 days away. The apartment is quiet. The internet is not.

event: GQ profile publishes — 'The Classical Kid Arrives'; cover and 8-page spread; shoots from November 2025
alex_pov_summary: He's read it. He doesn't recognise himself entirely but it isn't wrong. Elton texts immediately: "Darling — GQ. Finally."

event: Grammy rehearsal week begins — nominee media commitments and press day (Recording Academy protocol)
alex_pov_summary: Two days of press. He does it. Nadia coordinates every minute.

event: Dinner at Zero Bond — NY social circuit; NY Lot crew; Marcus has a table
alex_pov_summary: Normal evening. Marcus booked it. Henry argued about the wine list. Timothée came late and left early.

event: Recording Academy nominees reception — Grammy week eve; industry dinner; DG table
alex_pov_summary: The industry in one room. Alex is polite and moves efficiently. He does not linger.

event: 68th Grammy Awards — Crypto.com Arena Los Angeles; Alex nominated Best Classical Solo Instrumental Album; Homer and Rosie attending as Grammy Legends (annual — Rosie has not released since 1980); staying at Laurel Canyon
alex_pov_summary: He is nominated. Homer and Rosie are in the room — they go every year, Grammy Legends. This year Alex is also there, as something different. Kevin is on detail. Win or loss: Ryan decides.

event: Grammy aftermath — Laurel Canyon / LA; Vanity Fair party; industry circuit; Eleanor debrief; Homer and Rosie still in town
alex_pov_summary: The morning after tells you where the year goes. Homer makes coffee. Rosie does not ask how he feels. Eleanor waits until noon to call.

event: Return compound — decompression period; Homer in studio; no public schedule
alex_pov_summary: He needs a week. Homer doesn't say anything. The studio is open.

event: Valentine's Day — social media ambient attention spikes; tabloid speculation cycle
alex_pov_summary: He doesn't post anything. This is itself a story the fan accounts run with for 48 hours.

event: Burberry campaign concept presentation — London (remote or in-person TBD); first creative meeting for campaign that hasn't yet gone live
alex_pov_summary: The campaign that's been signed but not shot. First creative session. Alex has opinions about the direction.

event: Milan Men's Fashion Week — Loewe and Versace shows; Alex front row; AL.X coordination heavy
alex_pov_summary: Third fashion week. The routine is established. He knows the photographers by name now. He moves differently through these rooms than he did in September.

event: Post-MFW dinner — Tommaso Ferrini hosts; La Terrazza core; Camille and Félix fly in
alex_pov_summary: The real Milan. Tommaso's table. No obligations. Someone opened something extraordinary and nobody can remember what.

event: London — Kensington; Homer at The Stave; Jess Okonkwo Wigmore recommendation; Freddie pub
alex_pov_summary: London always feels different from New York. Quieter in the right ways. Homer spends two hours in the listening room with Marcus Boyle.

event: Paris Fashion Week — Dior and Stella McCartney shows; Stella is godmother so the Dior show is her territory to navigate diplomatically
alex_pov_summary: Stella is fully aware of the Dior contract. She was involved in negotiating the terms. The fashion world watches the picture of them arriving together.

event: Return compound — spring settle; Keeneland Spring Meet in three weeks; Tommy back from wherever Tommy was
alex_pov_summary: He's been away since January with gaps. The compound recalibrates him. Tommy appears on the second day as if he never left.

event: Keeneland Spring Meet begins — annual racing; Alex in Keeneland Club; Sayre Boys crew; industry people; press light relative to London
alex_pov_summary: This is home-scale famous. Everyone knows him and nobody makes a thing of it. The horses are the point.

event: Le Occasioni (Album II) releases via Deutsche Grammophon — Schubert D.960 / Liszt Bénédiction / Ravel Gaspard / Montale coda; recorded back to back with Album I at compound studio; Homer Wilson producing
alex_pov_summary: The second record is out. DG handles the announcement. Homer is at the compound. Alex does not post anything on release day — the record speaks.

event: Burberry campaign shoot — London (first live campaign work); location TBD
alex_pov_summary: The campaign that's been waiting since the signing. It goes live after this. Something shifts in the public-facing record.

event: Coachella Weekend 1 — Alex's first ever Coachella (has done Glastonbury many times and other festivals but Coachella always clashed — school, Juilliard, RAM); wearing custom Burberry look designed for the festival; first public images of Alex in Burberry circulate as festival photography before official campaign launch; Sabrina Carpenter headlining; Justin Bieber headlining
alex_pov_summary: His first Coachella. He has watched it from a distance every year — always something in the way. Not this year. The Burberry look is custom. The photos will run everywhere before Karla Otto's team even files the press release.

event: PRIVATE — PLAYER CHOICE ONLY — DO NOT REFERENCE IN PUBLIC CONTENT OR MEDIA RENDERS: Possibility of surprise stage appearance / guest set during Coachella Weekend 1. Headliners Sabrina Carpenter and Justin Bieber both known to Alex through Circle and Summer House connections. Nature and scope of any appearance: Ryan's call during scene. Information wall: zero public knowledge until played.
alex_pov_summary: PRIVATE. This exists in the files. It does not exist in the world until Ryan plays it. Do not telegraph. Do not hint in public-facing renders. Do not write fan accounts anticipating it.

event: Burberry campaign launches — digital and print; official launch on Coachella Weekend 2; first public images already circulating from Weekend 1; all five fashion houses simultaneously live for the first time
alex_pov_summary: Five houses. All live now. The Weekend 1 photos have been running for a week. Today is when it becomes official. The coverage reframes him — there is a before and after to this image in the public record.

event: Coachella Weekend 2 — second weekend; Burberry campaign officially launches same day; five houses simultaneously live; Sabrina Carpenter and Justin Bieber headlining
alex_pov_summary: Weekend 2. The campaign is live. The photos from Weekend 1 have been everywhere for a week. Today is the official version of something that has already happened. He does not check his phone during the headliner set.

event: Met Gala — Metropolitan Museum New York; Alex as co-chair (announced Dec 2025); Young Met Board; this is his most prominent public event since the Grammys
alex_pov_summary: Co-chair. He's been to every one since he was 10 — with Rosie then alone then as someone people watch. This one is different. Eleanor briefs him for three days running.

event: Met Gala aftermath — press cycle peaks; coverage runs for 72 hours; tabloid speculation about companions
alex_pov_summary: The morning after the Met Gala is its own event. He's off his phone until noon.

event: European summer planning confirmed — Sardinia June-July; Ibiza brief stop; circuit begins
alex_pov_summary: Eleanor has the schedule. Kevin has the security plan. Nadia has the logistics. Alex has a window.

event: Glastonbury Festival — VIP compound; social circuit; 200000 people; pap scale high but crowd absorption applies
alex_pov_summary: His birthday four days prior (June 22 — but story time shifts). Glastonbury is chaos and he loves it in a specific way. The scale flattens the hierarchy.

event: Alex Wilson birthday — 23rd; compound or Sardinia depending on story; quiet preferred
alex_pov_summary: He is 23. He makes no announcement. The Circle members text over a 48-hour window. Tommy texts exactly nothing and then appears in person.

event: Villa Serena summer residency begins — Sardinia; La Terrazza core arriving in rotation
alex_pov_summary: The annual reset. The private cove. Tommaso arrives first and the house opens.

event: Ibiza circuit stop — brief; social; Ushuaïa or DC10 depending on crew energy
alex_pov_summary: Two days. He's done this enough times that it's texture not event.

event: NYFW — September opens; this is the fashion week that reoriented everything in 2025; second year in now
alex_pov_summary: Second NYFW. Different scale. He's a fixture now — not a new face.

event: Keeneland Fall Meet — second annual; Sayre Boys; racing; home circuit
alex_pov_summary: The fall version. Slightly cooler. The colours are different. The crowd is the same people he grew up with.

event: Carnegie Hall — second solo recital; Le Occasioni programme (Album II material); second Carnegie in 12 months
alex_pov_summary: The second Carnegie. Album II is out. The programme is Le Occasioni in full. Different weight from the first time — the room knows what to expect now, and he plays into that.

event: Grammy eligibility confirmed — Le Occasioni (Album II, April 2026 release) eligible for 69th Grammy Awards; DG and Eleanor flag the window
alex_pov_summary: Le Occasioni released April 2026 — inside the September 1 cutoff. It is eligible. Nobody mentions it to Alex until DG sends a one-line note.

event: Year-end compound return — Rosie and Homer; Circle Christmas circuit; Woodford County settle
alex_pov_summary: The year closes the same way it opened — with the compound
trigger_for: the family. The circle comes through in December rotation as always.

event: Year-end — 2026 closes; story continuity open
alex_pov_summary: The compound at New Year. Same as every year. Different everything else.
